title: retrieval_config — one stream definition
description: The retrieval configuration as data: the query tools/fetch_pubmed.py runs, its default window, and its cap. Refining the stream is a data edit — visible on the issues view — never a code edit. At most one config is active per source (enforced in validate.py); deactivate rather than delete, because runs reference their config forever.

query.description: The E-utilities term — this stream's definition of relevance at retrieval time.

window_days.description: Default trailing window when a fetch isn't given explicit dates.

active.description: tools/fetch_pubmed.py runs the active config for its source.
